provider: Docker json-file log driver (Node.js API service)
incident: Redis maxmemory exhaustion with noeviction policy: memory-high warnings -> OOM errors on SET -> all new session writes fail with 500s; recurring distractor: slow disk writes on upload path

ground_truth.needle: oom command not allowed when used memory > 'maxmemory'
ground_truth.desc: Redis rejecting writes because maxmemory reached with noeviction policy
Application layer propagating the OOM as a cache write error
noeviction policy confirmed as reason keys are not evicted
Session creation endpoint returning 500 to all clients
